title: Youngia humifusa
intro: Youngia humifusa, also known as White Mustard or White Lettuce, is a perennial plant species in the Asteraceae family, native to East Asia. The health benefits of Youngia humifusa include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis. The plant's bioactive constituents include sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Youngia humifusa is commonly used in traditional herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and promote digestion.
taxonomy: Youngia humifusa is classified within the family Asteraceae. This family, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family, comprises a wide range of flowering plants. Within the plant kingdom, Youngia humifusa is further classified as a member of the kingdom Plantae.
